name: Sourdough Potato Dill Bread for the Zojirushi
recipeIngredient: (plus 1 or 2 T if dough is still wet after 10 minutes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in the bread machine.
2. Program for Dark and Basic White Bread settings.
3. Press start.
Note: Save the potato cooking water to use as an ingredient when boiling potatoes. If using a different bread machine, follow the manufacturer's instructions for ingredient placement and use whole wheat setting if available. If your machine cannot handle whole wheat recipes, proceed with caution.
